headline: Barclays Lifts Ross Stores (ROST) PT after Strong Q1 Comparable Sales Growth
summary: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) is included among the 10 Best June Dividend Stocks to Buy. On May 26, Barclays raised its price recommendation on Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) to $260 from $242. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm said the company’s Q1 comparable sales growth of 17% came in well above […]

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Ross Stores, Raises Price Target to $260
summary: Barclays  analyst Adrienne Yih   maintains Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $242 to $260.
